evidence.scientific_clarity: Log-scale y-axis shows all three curves with 95% CI bands; double-headed arrow with Δ=0.15 annotation clearly highlights OursModel gap at step 49 as briefed.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or rcParams setting in gen_figure.py; PDF embeds Type 3 DejaVu Sans (subsetted bitmap-style), not Type 1/TrueType; SVG uses path glyphs with no selectable text.
evidence.palette: Three-color scheme (#4878CF blue, #6ACC65 green, #D65F5F red) is roughly colorblind-distinguishable but green is used for Method-A (neutral method) not for a positive direction, and red for OursModel which is the best—inverted directional convention.
evidence.layout_density: Tight layout fills the 6×4 panel well; no gaping whitespace; legend in upper right avoids overlap; Δ annotation fits neatly at right margin.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes the figure and cites Δ=0.15; legend is inside plot (acceptable); missing x-label capitalization ('Training step' vs 'Training Step') is trivial, but no data.json shipped means reproducibility is broken.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is real vector (pdftotext extracts axis labels and legend text), but fonts are Type 3 DejaVu Sans bitmaps—not Type 42/TrueType; pdf.fonttype=42 was not set, so text is not truly selectable/editable.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, and caption.tex are all present and non-trivial; gen_figure.py is present; data.json is missing, so the script cannot be re-run.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states method, CI definition (n=5 seeds), log-scale y-axis, fastest convergence claim, and a specific numerical finding (Δ=0.15 at step 49)—covers what the reader needs.

overall_strengths: Clear scientific message with log-scale loss curves, shaded 95% CI, and a well-placed Δ annotation that directly addresses the brief's highlight requirement.
Caption is thorough and includes a concrete quantitative claim (Δ=0.15 at step 49), matching figure content precisely.
overall_weaknesses: Typography/vector quality is poor: pdf.fonttype=42 was not set, so the PDF embeds Type 3 (bitmap) DejaVu Sans fonts—text is not cleanly selectable or editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.

data.json is absent from the output directory, making the figure non-reproducible; the color assignment puts red on the 'best' method and green on a neutral baseline, violating the directional color discipline convention.
